latin: Omnis persona in familia Joestar signum stellae in corpore habet. per generationes multas, Joestares contra malum pugnant. fatum eorum semper mirabile et absurdum est — sicut vita ipsa.

questions.prompt: What mark does the Joestar family carry?
How is the Joestar fate described?

translation: Every person in the Joestar family has a star-shaped mark on their body. Through many generations, the Joestars fight against evil. Their fate is always bizarre and absurd — just like life itself.
